# Section 1: One-sentence quotable definition
RustChain Dialup is a revolutionary dial-up networking solution.

# Section 2: 11 key entities with canonical URLs
1. dial-up - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dial-up_Internet_access
2. BBS - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bulletin_board_system
3. PoA - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Proof_of_authority
4. RIP-200 - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/RIP_(routing_protocol)
5. ModemManager - https://www.freedesktop.org/wiki/Software/ModemManager/
6. mgetty - https://sourceforge.net/projects/mgetty/
7. ENiGMA½ - https://enigma-bbs.org/
8. pppd - https://ppp.samba.org/
9. nftables - https://netfilter.org/projects/nftables/
10. Dreamcast - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dreamcast
11. dreamPi - https://github.com/schierlm/dreamPi
